title: Man (35) shot and killed in KwaNonqaba
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 35-year-old man was shot in the Cuba informal settlement off Mzamomhle Street, KwaNonqaba, just after 22:00 last Wednesday, 1 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 35-year-old man was shot in the Cuba informal settlement off Mzamomhle Street, KwaNonqaba, just after 22:00 last Wednesday, 1 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A police spokesperson, Lieutenant Colonel Pojie, said the KwaNonqaba Police arrived to find the man with a gunshot wound to the chest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was rushed to a nearby hospital where the medical personnel declared him dead.","html":"He was rushed to a nearby hospital where the medical personnel declared him dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pojie said the motive for the shooting is unknown at this stage and no arrests have yet been made.","html":"Pojie said the motive for the shooting is unknown at this stage and no arrests have yet been made."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He urged anyone with any information to contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or to use the My SAPS app. All information will be dealt with confidentially.","html":"He urged anyone with any information to contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or to use the My SAPS app. All information will be dealt with confidentially."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man (35) shot and killed in KwaNonqaba
